title: tragacantha angustissima
intro: Tragacantha angustissima, also known as the Narrow-leaved Hair sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and indigestion. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as a natural diuretic. Tragacantha angustissima can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by mixing its leaves with a solvent, to be used in traditional medicine.
